title: [issue]: Ventoy怎么安装Android_x86 To Go
author: Yebohan1
body:
### Official FAQ

- [x] I have checked the official FAQ.

### Ventoy Version

1.1.16

### What about latest release

Yes. I have tried the latest release, but the bug still exist.

### Try alternative boot mode

Yes. I have tried them, but the bug still exist.

### BIOS Mode

UEFI Mode

### Partition Style

GPT

### Disk Capacity

128GB

### Disk Manufacturer

海康威视

### Image file checksum (if applicable)

Yes.

### Image file download link (if applicable)

https://pan.baidu.com/s/1wsTfJupOjSkuDsqxEQ27HA?pwd=3x8v

### What happened?

我想把BlissOS 15（Android_x86改版）安装在U盘里，做成BlissOS To GO （ISO的Live重启就散了），我试了Linux适用的VDisk和数据持久化插件都不行，VDisk一直找不到系统，卡在
`Detecting Android-x86 ...`
`If it took too long to detect,reboot and check your installation folder`
然后一直打点。如果正常的话，会显示`Found at /dev/sdX`。
在ISO的Live Debug模式（纯终端）运行数据持久化的sh脚本，报一大堆错，找不到mkfs，文件系统只读，等等
求大佬指点！！！

title: [issue]: Live injection unsuccessful
author: marianiske
body:
### Official FAQ

- [x] I have checked the official FAQ.

### Ventoy Version

1.1.16

### What about latest release

No. I didn't try the latest release.

### Try alternative boot mode

Yes. I have tried them, but the bug still exist.

### BIOS Mode

Legacy BIOS Mode

### Partition Style

MBR

### Disk Capacity

64GB

### Disk Manufacturer

_No response_

### Image file checksum (if applicable)

None

### Image file download link (if applicable)

_No response_

### What happened?

Live Injection does not inject files into a custom Ubuntu 26.04 (casper-based) ISO, even though the injection archive is correctly staged in the initramfs. hook.sh from the LiveInjection tool appears to never actually be invoked (or is invoked without the expected ostype argument), so it exits immediately without doing anything.

I use ventoy.json:
{
    "injection": [
        {
            "image": "/custom_iso_2026-07-10_09-42-24.iso",
            "archive": "/vpn-secrets-injection.tar.gz"
        }
    ]
}
Injection archive built via ventoy/LiveInjection v1.0's pack.sh
Expected: /opt/vpn-secrets/{bootstrap.conf,secrets.env} exist in the booted live system.

Actual: /opt/vpn-secrets/ does not exist at all.

Investigation: Dropped into an initramfs shell right after casper-bottom scripts run (break=bottom). Found /live_injection_<uuid>/ staged correctly (hook.sh, distro/, sysroot.tar.gz), but sysroot.tar.gz is still packed/unextracted and no log file exists — per hook.sh's own code, this means it hit its very first check (ostype=$1; [ -n "$ostype" ]) and exited immediately, implying it was called with an empty/missing argument, or never called. Confirmed via dmesg that /vtoy/vtoy runs as PID 1 init. Grepping the distro's own initramfs (/init, all of /scripts/*, /ventoy/hook/*) for live_injection finds nothing, confirming the (attempted) call happens entirely inside the closed /vtoy/vtoy binary. Statically verified all of debian/hook.sh's own prerequisites are met: /scripts/casper-bottom/ exists with an ORDER file, /root is the real final-rootfs mountpoint.

Question: Is there a known issue with Live Injection and layered-squashfs/newer casper ISOs where /vtoy/vtoy fails to determine/pass the OS type to hook.sh?

title: [issue]: Ventoy version 1.1.14 and later does not boot on Macbook Air (mid 2012)
author: fnimick
body:
### Official FAQ

- [x] I have checked the official FAQ.

### Ventoy Version

1.1.14

### What about latest release

Yes. I have tried the latest release, but the bug still exist.

### Try alternative boot mode

No. I didn't try these alternative boot modes.

### BIOS Mode

UEFI Mode

### Partition Style

GPT

### Disk Capacity

128 GB

### Disk Manufacturer

Verbatim

### Image file checksum (if applicable)

None

### Image file download link (if applicable)

_No response_

### What happened?

The mac model in question is: https://everymac.com/systems/apple/macbook-air/specs/macbook-air-core-i7-2.0-13-mid-2012-specs.html

With Ventoy 1.1.14, 1.1.15, or 1.1.16, the system hangs as soon as the USB drive is selected in the Mac's boot options menu. With Ventoy 1.1.12 and earlier, the system boots normally.

I can test on other Macs and with other disks later.

title: [issue]: grubx64.efi missing from VTOYEFI partition
author: eaglgenes101
body:
### Official FAQ

- [x] I have checked the official FAQ.

### Ventoy Version

1.1.16

### What about latest release

Yes. I have tried the latest release, but the bug still exist.

### Try alternative boot mode

No. I didn't try these alternative boot modes.

### BIOS Mode

UEFI Mode

### Partition Style

GPT

### Disk Capacity

128GB

### Disk Manufacturer

SanDisk

### Image file checksum (if applicable)

_No response_

### Image file download link (if applicable)

_No response_

### What happened?

In trying to chainload to bootx64.efi on a ventoy drive, I get the error that my drive is missing a file at /efi/boot/grubx64.efi. Directly booting from the drive works just fine. Browsing the files in VTOYEFI/efi/boot, I see there's a grubia32.efi file, so I presume there should be a corresponding grubx64.efi file. 

The install last worked to place grub.efi on the drive in version 1.1.12.

title: [issue]: 无法使用usb键盘
author: mendaxcat
body: ### Official FAQ - [x] I have checked the official FAQ. ### Ventoy Version 1.1.16 ### What about latest release Yes. I have tried the latest release, but the bug still exist. ### Try alternative boot mode No. I didn't try these alternative boot modes. ### BIOS Mode Legacy BIOS Mode ### Partition Style MBR ### Disk Capacity 16GB ### Disk Manufacturer Lenovo ### Image file checksum (if applicable) None ### Image file download link (if applicable) _No response_ ### What happened? ventoy开发者你们好 在bios的boot menu时, usb键盘是可用的, 这里选择usb-hdd 然后进入ventoy的镜像选择页面, 此时usb键盘就没法用了, 随便按什么都没反应(甚至capslock也没有反应) 后来我找了一个PS/2键盘, 才发现其实ventoy并没有死掉, 一旦进入系统安装界面, usb键盘就又恢复正常了 主板是一张非常老的技嘉G41MT-D3

title: [issue]: Stuck bios and can't boot anything when secureboot enabled
author: ikhoeyZX
body:
### Official FAQ

- [x] I have checked the official FAQ.

### Ventoy Version

1.1.16

### What about latest release

Yes. I have tried the latest release, but the bug still exist.

### Try alternative boot mode

Yes. I have tried them, but the bug still exist.

### BIOS Mode

UEFI Mode

### Partition Style

MBR

### Disk Capacity

128GB

### Disk Manufacturer

Kingstone

### Image file checksum (if applicable)

dff95e2d7bb100c151a50a3331e56e15dc2a15f9

### Image file download link (if applicable)

_No response_

### What happened?

After install windows 11 25H2 ISO (official windows) it stuck bios, can't boot any images and efi files. Also it will persistent in BIOS even changing SSD / HDD / USB (so you can't attach any bootable OS).
i did tested in msi thin gf63 12vf, Lenovo LOQ 15IRX10, Asus TUF V16, Acer Nitro V16, and Asus E1404KA.
Also i did tried update bios but it still lockup to BIOS *IF* you not disable secureboot.

to fix it only 2 way, Full reset BIOS chip using special tool (if password protected) or disable secureboot (again some vendor or laptop didn't allow it)
